---
title: "News & Recognition
page-layout: full
---

# In the News

Selected media coverage, university features, awards, and professional recognition highlighting my research, leadership, and academic contributions.

## 2025

::: {.news-grid}

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/vanguard-deepfake.jpg)

**AI, Deepfakes, and the Battle for Truth**

*Vanguard* • February 2025

Featured discussing artificial intelligence, deepfakes, misinformation, and the societal implications of emerging technologies.

[Read Article](https://www.vanguardngr.com/2025/02/ai-deepfakes-battle-for-truth-combating-digital-misinformation-in-age-of-emerging-technologies/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/guardian-disinformation.jpg)

**Disinformation and Public Perception**

*The Guardian Nigeria* • 2025

Featured discussing disinformation, public perception, governance, and policy implementation.

[Read Article](https://guardian.ng/news/amaka-onebunne-on-disinformation-and-public-perception-the-silent-threat-to-governance-and-policy-implementation/){target="_blank"}

:::

:::

---

## 2024

::: {.news-grid}

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/vanguard-ai.jpg)

**Future of Journalism**

*Vanguard* • July 2024

Interview discussing AI adoption in Nigerian newsrooms, fact-checking, and the future of journalism.

[Read Article](https://www.vanguardngr.com/2024/07/future-of-journalism-how-ai-can-enhance-fact-checking-combat-misinformation-onebunne/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/punch-ai.jpg)

**AI Bias in Nigerian Newsrooms**

*Punch Newspapers* • 2024

Featured discussing algorithmic bias and challenges facing Nigerian news organizations.

[Read Article](https://punchng.com/ai-bias-the-challenges-faced-by-nigerian-newsrooms/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/niu.jpg)

**Graduate Student Programming Promotes Inclusivity and Opportunity**

*NIU Today* • March 2024

Featured by Northern Illinois University for contributions to graduate student leadership and programming.

[Read Article](https://niutoday.info/2024/03/12/niu-graduate-student-programming-promotes-inclusivity-and-opportunity/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/northernstar.jpg)

**Student Government Elections**

*Northern Star* • 2024

Featured in coverage of Student Government Association election initiatives.

[Read Article](https://northernstar.info/109605/news/sga-looks-to-promote-elections/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/technovation.jpg)

**Technovation Girls Regional Winner**

*Technovation* • 2024

Recognized among the 2024 Technovation Girls Regional Winners.

[Read Article](https://www.technovation.org/blogs/2024-technovation-girls-finalists-and-regional-winners/){target="_blank"}

:::

:::

---

## Conference Recognition

::: {.news-grid}

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/csca.jpg)

**Central States Communication Association**

Featured in official CSCA conference announcements and award recognitions.

[Conference Announcement](https://www.csca-net.org/aws/CSCA/pt/fli/153119/false){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/csca2.jpg)

**CSCA Conference Recognition**

Official conference feature highlighting presentations and recognition.

[View Announcement](https://www.csca-net.org/aws/CSCA/pt/fli/150594/false){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/aejmc.jpg)

**AEJMC Southeast Colloquium**

Research accepted and featured in the official conference program.

[Conference Program](https://ci.uky.edu/sites/default/files/2024-03/2024%20SE%20AEJMC%20Final_0.pdf){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/ndsu.jpg)

**CSCA Conference Highlights**

Featured by North Dakota State University following conference presentations.

[View Post](https://www.facebook.com/NDSUCOMM/photos/our-graduate-students-represented-the-department-well-at-cscabukola-oloba-veroni/1145525877372000/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/temple-forum.jpg)

**Temple University Graduate Research Forum**

Invited presenter at the Klein College Graduate Research Forum.

:::

::: {.news-card}

![](images/news/temple-talk.jpg)

**Temple Research Presentation**

Invited to present research at Temple University.

:::

:::
